case_title: ANTONIO SANCHEZ DIAZ VS. NITIDO CLEANING SOLUTIONS, INC. A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, ANTONIO SANCHEZ AS TO DEFENDANT NITIDO CLEANING SOLUTIONS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ, ANTONIO SANCHEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NITIDO CLEANING SOLUTIONS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $8,765.07 PRINCIPAL, $96.01 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,086.08, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
